title: SummaryResponse
description: U7 Summarization DTO contract. The ROOT schema describes SummaryResponse — the union (oneOf) returned by on-demand actions (FR-12/13/14) and branched by U5 ApiClient to surface status. All named DTOs (SummaryRequest, SummaryResultDTO, SummaryDraft, Anchor, TranslationDraft, PendingDTO, AbstainDTO, CostDegradedDTO, SourceUnavailableDTO) are defined in $defs for type generation.

SummarizeTask.description: The specific summarization task: core summary generation or language translation. Trace: FR-12, FR-13.

SummarizeScope.description: The scope of source text used: abstract-only or full paper text. Trace: FR-13.

Persona.description: The target persona for summary generation: expert-level or beginner-level. Trace: FR-14.

SummaryRequest.title: SummaryRequest
SummaryRequest.description: Request payload to trigger summarization or translation (FR-12/13/14).

paperId.description: The unique identifier of the paper (arXiv ID). Trace: FR-12.

version.description: The version of the paper. Trace: FR-12.

targetLang.description: Target language for translation. Trace: FR-13.

abstract.description: Optional raw abstract string carried for full-text fallback or abstract-only translation. Trace: FR-13.

AnchorTarget.description: Target type for a grounding anchor reference. Trace: FR-12.

Anchor.title: Anchor
Anchor.description: A structured citation anchor mapping a claim back to source paper evidence (FR-12/US-S3).

field.description: The summary field name this anchor belongs to. Trace: FR-12.

span.description: The exact source quote or text span. Trace: FR-12.

label.description: Derived section, table, or figure label (e.g. 'Section 3.1'). Trace: FR-12.

Reproducibility.title: Reproducibility
Reproducibility.description: Quick assessment of code and data availability. Trace: FR-12.

code.description: Exposed code repository link or availability statement. Trace: FR-12.

data.description: Exposed dataset link or availability statement. Trace: FR-12.

SummaryDraft.title: SummaryDraft
SummaryDraft.description: Structured research paper summary containing key dimensions and citation anchors.

tldr.description: A single-sentence TL;DR of the paper. Trace: FR-12.

limitations.description: Limitations noted by the authors or pipeline. Trace: FR-12.

anchors.description: Grounding anchors for claims. Trace: FR-12.

truncated.description: Flag indicating if the summary draft was truncated. Trace: FR-12.

TranslationDraft.title: TranslationDraft
TranslationDraft.description: Translated paper content keeping core technical terminology.

koreanText.description: Korean translated body text. Trace: FR-13.

keptTerms.description: Untranslated terminology or glossary terms. Trace: FR-13.

fallback.description: Fallback reason if processing was degraded (e.g., 'abstract'). Trace: FR-13.

SummaryResultDTO.title: SummaryResultDTO
SummaryResultDTO.description: Successful summary or translation response. Only SEC-9 white-listed fields are exposed.

cached.description: Indicates if the response was served from cache. Trace: FR-11.

PendingDTO.title: PendingDTO
PendingDTO.description: A long-input summary (LengthRouter MAP_REDUCE band) is being produced asynchronously as a background job (BR-S6/BR-S8): a cache miss enqueued a summary job. The client re-requests the same action after retryAfterMs and gets the result on a cache hit once the worker finishes. Trace: BR-S6, BR-S8, #135.

retryAfterMs.description: Suggested client poll backoff in milliseconds before re-requesting.

AbstainDTO.title: AbstainDTO
AbstainDTO.description: Returned when summary is abstained due to failure to pass grounding validation rules. Trace: FR-12.

reason.description: Non-technical reason for abstaining. Trace: SEC-9.

CostDegradedDTO.title: CostDegradedDTO
CostDegradedDTO.description: Returned when the budget circuit is OPEN and operations are degraded. Trace: NFR-C1.

SourceUnavailableDTO.title: SourceUnavailableDTO
SourceUnavailableDTO.description: Returned when source content is unavailable for processing. Trace: FR-12.

reason.description: Reason for source unavailability. Trace: SEC-9.

AssetRef.title: AssetRef
AssetRef.description: FR-17 figure/table view-model (display-only). Produced by U1 ingestion (paper_asset), presigned by U7. SEC-9: a short-lived signed `url` only — the S3 object_ref and internal manifest columns are NEVER exposed.

ordinal.description: Display order within its type. Trace: FR-17.

caption.description: Figure/table caption (escaped on render). Trace: FR-17.

sourceMode.description: How the asset was extracted (hybrid). Trace: FR-17.

url.description: Short-lived signed GET URL (SEC-9). Trace: FR-17, SEC-9.

assets.description: Figure/table assets in display order. Trace: FR-17.

AssetsLicenseUnavailableDTO.title: AssetsLicenseUnavailableDTO
AssetsLicenseUnavailableDTO.description: OA license not permitted (or assets not configured) → no assets shown. Trace: FR-17, BR-SF-11.

PaperAssetsResponse.title: PaperAssetsResponse
PaperAssetsResponse.description: GET /api/papers/{id}/assets terminal union (FR-17). OA-license-gated like full-text (BR-SF-11).
